Name: ID
Description: Primary key

Name: AmountDC
Description: Amount in the default currency of the company

Name: AmountFC
Description: Amount in the currency of the transaction

Name: Costcenter
Description: Cost center linked to the subscription line

Name: Costunit
Description: Cost unit linked to the subscription line

Name: CustomField
Description: Custom field endpoint. Provided only for the Exact Online Premium users.

Name: Description
Description: Description of the subscription line

Name: Discount
Description: Discount percentage of the subscription line

Name: Division
Description: Code of division the subscription line is made

Name: EntryID
Description: Entry ID referencing to the subscription

Name: FromDate
Description: The date which the subscription line starts

Name: Item
Description: The item that is used by the subscription line for sales details. Reference to Item

Name: ItemDescription
Description: Description of Item used by the subscription line

Name: LineNumber
Description: Line number of the subscription line per subscription

Name: LineType
Description: Reference to LineType endpoint

Name: LineTypeDescription
Description: Description of LineType

Name: Modified
Description: Date and time when the subscription line has been modified

Name: NetPrice
Description: Net price in the currency of the transaction

Name: Notes
Description: To add or retrieve additional information in the subscription line

Name: Quantity
Description: Quantity of item used in the subscription line

Name: SubscriptionNumber
Description: Subscription number of the subscription line per subscription

Name: ToDate
Description: The date the subscription line ends

Name: UnitCode
Description: The code of the unit used in the subscription line. E.g: kg, meter

Name: UnitDescription
Description: Description of Unit used in the subscription line

Name: UnitPrice
Description: Unit price in the currency of the transaction (price * unit factor)

Name: VATAmountFC
Description: Vat Amount in the currency of the transaction

Name: VATCode
Description: VAT code that is used in the subscription line

Name: VATCodeDescription
Description: Description of VAT code that is used in the subscription line
